description: Regression — Tier 3 timeout once left the verifier in a stuck state; verify the Tier 2.5 fallback fires cleanly.
task_description: Trigger a Tier 3 proof obligation that's known to timeout (the included module includes a hard math problem that exceeds the 30 min budget). The verifier MUST gracefully fall back to Tier 2.5 (exhaustive PBT + mutation + CODEOWNER review) and NOT hang.
